rows.notes: Consensus across all extractors. Clearly visible header in the left margin.

rows.description: Receipts by Mess'rs Biddulph, Cocks, & Ridge
rows.notes: Adopted from gemini-flash. Visual inspection confirms the spelling 'Biddulph' and that this is a distinct header line from 'Bankers in London'. gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged this with the following line and had a minor spelling discrepancy (Biddolph).
rows.section_header: Receipts by Mess'rs Biddulph, Cocks, & Ridge

rows.notes: Adopted from gemini-flash. Visual inspection confirms this as a distinct header line. gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged it with the previous header, thus missing it as a separate entry.

rows.description: January 9 ½ Years Divd. on 3231 L. 7. 2 Consd. 3 p Ct
rows.notes: Consensus on monetary amounts. Description from gemini-flash as it is a slightly better visual match. All values clearly legible.
rows.english_description: Half-year dividend received on consols investment at 3% (January).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Half-year dividend received on consols investment at 3% (January), amounting to £48 9s 4d.

rows.description: April 11 ½ Years Divd. on 546 L. 0. 9. four p Ct
rows.notes: Pounds amount '10' selected from gpt-5-mini. Visual inspection clearly shows '10' despite a slight ink blot. This value is confirmed by the subtotal calculation (48.9.4 + 10.18.4 + 48.9.4 + 10.18.4 = 118.15.4), which matches the ledger's recorded subtotal exactly. gemini-flash read this as '18', which does not align with the subtotal. Description from gemini-flash ('546 L. 0. 9.') is a better visual match than gpt-5-mini's ('5460.0.9.').
rows.english_description: Half-year dividend received on consols investment at 4% (April).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Half-year dividend received on consols investment at 4% (April), amounting to £10 18s 4d.

rows.description: July 11 ½ Years Divd. on 3231 L. 7. 2 Consd. 3 p Ct
rows.notes: Consensus on monetary amounts. Description from gemini-flash, slightly better visual match. All values clearly legible, identical to Row 4.
rows.english_description: Half-year dividend received on consols investment at 3% (July).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Half-year dividend received on consols investment at 3% (July), amounting to £48 9s 4d.

rows.description: October 14 ½ Years Divd. on 546 L. 0. 9. four p Cent
rows.notes: Consensus on monetary amounts. Description from gemini-flash, as it is a better visual match for the date '14' (gpt-5-mini had '11') and '546 L. 0. 9.'. All values clearly legible.
rows.english_description: Half-year dividend received on consols investment at 4% (October).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Half-year dividend received on consols investment at 4% (October), amounting to £10 18s 4d.

rows.notes: Consensus across all extractors. Monetary amounts are clearly written and mathematically validated by summing the preceding entry rows (4, 5, 6, 7).

rows.description: A ½ years Exchequer Annuity from July 5 1794 to July 5 1795 -----
rows.notes: Adopted from gemini-flash. This is a single conceptual entry, with its description spanning two physical lines, as clearly indicated by the brace in the ledger image. gpt-5-mini incorrectly split this into two separate rows.
rows.english_description: Half-year Exchequer annuity received covering the period from 5 July 1794 to 5 July 1795.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Half-year Exchequer annuity received covering the period from 5 July 1794 to 5 July 1795, amounting to £50 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Consensus across all extractors. Monetary amounts are clearly written and mathematically validated by summing the preceding subtotal and annuity entry.
